The relief sought is denied. This application is a malicious and strategic abuse of process, brought with the ulterior motive of removing me from my position after I uncovered and reported extensive financial misconduct within the corporate entities. The timing of this application, following my reports, is no coincidence.

The allegations are denied. The Applicant's feigned urgency is a fabrication. The true motive is to prevent the further exposure of the very financial irregularities I was investigating. My actions, far from justifying this application, were aimed at protecting the companies from ongoing financial harm.

This allegation is emphatically denied. My conduct was aimed at preventing detriment to the companies. The true detrimental conduct is the systematic financial sabotage I uncovered, including the dumping of two years of unallocated expenses onto RegimA Worldwide (RWW) on 30 March 2025, which I was pressured to sign off on within 12 hours.

This is a bare denial. The Applicant fails to cite a single specific action that constitutes a contravention of my fiduciary duties. To the contrary, my investigation and subsequent reports were a direct fulfillment of my duty to act in the best interests of the companies.

The contents are noted as the Applicant's statement of the law. However, the Applicant has failed to provide any factual basis to meet the requirements of these sections. This application is a textbook example of strategic litigation against a whistleblower.

I deny these allegations in the strongest possible terms. The only "harm" I have inflicted is upon the fraudulent scheme that was operating within the companies. My actions were not "gross abuse" but a necessary and lawful exercise of my duties. The Applicant's claims of fraud against me are a malicious inversion of the truth. The real fraud is the R5.4 million "stock adjustment" in Strategic Logistics (SLG) and the systematic hijacking of revenue streams from RWW, which began on 1 March 2025.

I deny these allegations. The Applicant's claim of "oppressive conduct" is a fabrication. The true oppression was the Applicant and his associates dumping two years of unallocated expenses on RWW and demanding I sign off on them within 12 hours on 30 March 2025. This was a clear attempt to make me complicit in their scheme. My refusal to do so is not oppressive conduct; it is responsible governance.

The Applicant's conclusion is noted. It is based on a distorted and incomplete version of events, and I am advised that it has no prospect of success.

I wholeheartedly agree and consent to an order for a truly independent forensic investigation. Such an investigation will vindicate me and confirm the substance of my reports. The investigation must have a broad mandate to investigate the R5.4 million SLG stock adjustment, the two years of unallocated expenses, the diversion of revenue from RWW starting on 1 March 2025, the secret cancellation of my business bank cards on 7 June 2025, and the role of Villa Via in extracting profits from the so-called "Group".

I agree. This is the central thesis of the reports I compiled between March and June 2025. The Applicant's attempt to attribute this to me is a desperate and transparent attempt to deflect blame from the individuals who are actually responsible for the missing funds. The Applicant has been aware of these issues since I first reported them and has chosen to attack the messenger rather than address the message.
The allegations herein are denied.
